scenarios.description: parseInput(Reader, String) wraps IOException from TreeBuilder.parse into RuntimeException (tests exception branch)
scenarios.precondition: Parser constructed with custom TreeBuilder whose parse(Reader,…) throws IOException
scenarios.expectedResult: RuntimeException is thrown with cause of type IOException
pseudocode: @Override public Document parse(Reader input, String baseUri, Parser parser) throws IOException {
// implement other abstract methods with no-op/stubs
throws RuntimeException with cause instanceof IOException;
